name: Classic Birthday Card
description: A warm, illustrated birthday card delivered instantly to the birthday page.

name: Luxury Birthday Card
description: A premium animated card with a personal message, gold foil effect.

name: Digital Flower Bouquet
description: A beautiful animated bouquet of flowers — roses, peonies, and sunflowers.

name: Single Red Rose
description: A classic red rose with a short personal message attached.

name: Heartfelt Message
description: Send a long-form personal message that stays pinned to the birthday page all day.

name: Birthday Poem
description: A hand-crafted birthday poem personalised with the recipient's name.

name: Birthday Star Badge
description: Award the birthday person a shining star badge displayed on their public page.

name: Queen / King for a Day Badge
description: Crown them queen or king — a regal badge shown at the top of their page.

name: Personalised Birthday Song
description: A short animated video with a birthday song and the recipient's name.

name: Memory Reel
description: Upload up to 5 photos and we turn them into a 30-second animated reel for the birthday page.
